commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Their widows are increased to me above the sand of the seas: I have brought upon them against the mother of the young men a destroyer at noonday: I have caused him to fall upon it suddenly, and terrors upon the city. Man, or "a spoiler of the young man "(Haydock) so that the widow shall also be deprived of her children. Hebrew, "the young spoiler "Nabuchodonosor. He shall not come like a night thief, to attack the metropolis.
